instruction: Write a FreeMarker macro `renderMeta` with parameters `title`, optional `description` defaulting to empty, and optional `robots` defaulting to "index,follow". Output title and meta description tags with escaped values.
code:
<#-- Macro: renderMeta(title, description="", robots="index,follow") -->
<#macro renderMeta title description="" robots="index,follow">
  <title>${title?html}</title>
  <#if description?has_content>
    <meta name="description" content="${description?html}">
  </#if>
  <meta name="robots" content="${robots?html}">
</#macro>
